title: AstralAzeta's Obsidian Armor
description: This mod adds an obsidian armor.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfaa451d9a1ef856e9f84cd456a4e3325b630138.png) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Discord-Button-64.png)](https://discord.gg/hFS6faY9tW) [![Alt Text](https://tr7zw.github.io/uikit/social_buttons_icon/Modrinth-Button-64.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/astralazetas-obsidian-armor)
Obsidian armor is strong as diamond. It has worse enchantability, but better durability.
Recipes ![Obsidian Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9958fceaf4d61af00a0e7d89bf13651053034ee3.png) ![Obsidian Chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79c06749f1f30725367db2c8cd4f77e4681f1296.png) ![Obsidian Leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc8c67f769c023f64c0b1f48940271352170e154.png) ![Obsidian Boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb338afbbdceb1695a0af30b7a165e352d28d98e.png)
